corrections.current: περιῄειν ζητῶν ὅπως λάβω αὐτὴν εἰς ἐμαυτόν.
corrections.correct: περιῆλθον ζητῶν ὅπως λάβω αὐτὴν εἰς ἐμαυτόν.
corrections.note: Printed text reads περιῆλθον, not infinitive περιῄειν.
The sigla are printed as B ℵ Aᶜ C; the transcription's backslash is a misread of the superscript c after A.
Swete prints Latin a b after B here, not superscript Greek-style letters.

notes: Outer-margin numbers 9–19 are line indicators and are correctly not treated as body text. Running head matches. Apparatus largely correct aside from siglum formatting and one body verb misread.
